manifest.description.message: Lagre og åpne URL-er fra Kages launcher. Skriv «bm <name>» for å åpne, «bm+ <name> <url>» for å lagre, «bm- <name>» for å slette.

result.add_help.label.description: Result label when the user types just `bm+`

result.add_help.description.description: Result description when the user types just `bm+`

result.add_bad.label.description: Result label when the URL fails validation

result.add_bad.description.message: URL må starte med http:// eller https://
result.add_bad.description.description: Result description when the URL fails validation

result.add.label.description: Result label for a valid save command

result.del.label.description: Result label for the delete command

result.list.label_query.description: Sync placeholder label while async results load with a query

result.list.label_all.description: Sync placeholder label while async results load without a query

result.list.loading.description: Description shown while async results load

result.none.description.description: Empty-result hint pointing to the save command
